home.valueProp3Desc: Pick a service, pick a time, and pay securely online. Done in under two minutes.

home.step3Desc: Your therapist arrives with everything needed. Enjoy a professional massage in your own space.

howItWorks.metaDescription: Learn how to book an in-home massage in three simple steps with Alvessa in Utrecht.
howItWorks.pageSubtitle: From choice to relaxation — in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Body: Browse our selection of certified massage therapists in Utrecht. View profiles, services, rates and reviews from other customers. Choose the style that suits your needs — relaxing, deep tissue or sports.
howItWorks.step2Title: Book a time at your address
howItWorks.step2Body: Select an available date and time. Enter your home address and leave an optional note for the therapist. Confirm your booking and pay securely online. You'll receive a confirmation email right away.
howItWorks.step3Body: Your therapist arrives at the agreed time with everything needed — massage table, linens and oil. You don't need to prepare anything. Afterwards there's no rush: relax at your own pace in your own space.
howItWorks.expect1: The therapist brings all necessary equipment.
howItWorks.expect2: Sessions last 60 or 90 minutes, depending on your choice.
howItWorks.expect3: Payment is processed securely online before the session.
howItWorks.expect4: Cancellation is free up to 24 hours before the appointment — contact us at hello@alvessa.nl.

forProviders.metaDescription: Join Alvessa and reach new clients in Utrecht as a certified massage therapist.
forProviders.pageSubtitle: Alvessa connects certified massage therapists in Utrecht with clients looking for an in-home massage.
forProviders.benefit1Desc: You set your own schedule. Define your availability and only accept bookings that fit your planning.
forProviders.benefit2Desc: We handle payments, client communication and confirmations. You focus on the treatment.
forProviders.benefit3Desc: After every completed session, your earnings are automatically transferred to your account via Stripe Connect.
forProviders.req1: Recognised massage qualification (SNRO, RBCZ or equivalent)
forProviders.req2: Own professional massage table and materials
forProviders.req3: Registered with the Chamber of Commerce
forProviders.req5: Service area in or around Utrecht
forProviders.howStep1: Send an email to providers@alvessa.nl with your qualification and a short introduction.
forProviders.howStep2: We schedule a brief introductory call (online or by phone).
forProviders.howStep3: Once approved, you create your profile and start receiving bookings immediately.
forProviders.ctaBody: Send us an email and we'll get back to you within two working days.
forProviders.applyMetaTitle: Apply as a massage therapist — Alvessa
forProviders.applyMetaDescription: Apply to join Alvessa as a massage therapist in Utrecht. Fill in the application form.
forProviders.applyPageSubtitle: Fill in the form. We will get back to you within two working days.
forProviders.applyNote: After approval by Alvessa your profile will become visible on the platform.

forProviders.applySuccessBody: Thank you for your application. We will contact you within two working days.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about booking an in-home massage with Alvessa in Utrecht.
faq.pageSubtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Send us a message via the contact page.
faq.a1: You pay securely online when confirming your booking via Stripe. The therapist receives payment after the completed session. We accept all major payment cards.
faq.a2: Yes, cancellation is free up to 24 hours before the session. Please contact us at hello@alvessa.nl to cancel. Cancellations within 24 hours may be subject to a cancellation fee.
faq.a3: We currently operate in Utrecht and the immediate surrounding area. Therapists specify their service area when signing up (typically a 10–20 km radius).
faq.a4: Every therapist on our platform has provided a recognised massage qualification, is registered with the Chamber of Commerce and holds valid professional liability insurance. We conduct a personal introductory interview before activating any profile.
faq.q5: What do I need to prepare?
faq.a5: Nothing. The therapist brings a massage table, linens and oil. Just clear some space in the room and set a comfortable atmosphere.
faq.q6: Can I always book the same therapist?
faq.a6: Yes, you can book a new appointment directly from your favourite therapist's profile.
faq.a7: Contact us at hello@alvessa.nl. We'll review your message carefully and get back to you as soon as possible.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Alvessa's mission: making premium in-home massage accessible to everyone in Utrecht.
about.missionBody: Alvessa makes premium in-home massage accessible to everyone in Utrecht. We believe professional relaxation isn't something for special occasions — it belongs in a healthy everyday life.
about.storyBody:
Alvessa was born from a simple idea: booking a professional massage should be as easy as ordering a taxi. No travel time, no searching for a salon, no scheduling stress. Just your therapist, at your home, on your schedule.

We're starting in Utrecht — a city full of active, busy people who deserve to unwind. From here we'll grow.
about.value1Desc: We'd rather onboard fewer therapists who are genuinely excellent than offer a large pool with inconsistent quality.
about.value2Desc: No hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.
about.value3Desc: Every detail of the booking experience — from choosing a service to payment — should feel effortless.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Alvessa for questions about bookings, therapists or partnerships in Utrecht.
contact.pageSubtitle: We're happy to help. Send us an email and we'll respond within one working day.
contact.generalNote: For questions about bookings, your account or the platform.
contact.providersNote: Interested in joining as a therapist? Send us your qualification and a short introduction.
contact.responseBody: We typically respond within one working day. During busy periods this may take two working days.
contact.faqNote: Your answer might already be there.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.body: Alvessa uses functional cookies required for the website to work (login, bookings). We do not place tracking or advertising cookies.

privacy.metaDescription: Read Alvessa's privacy policy. We process your data carefully and in compliance with GDPR.
privacy.s1Body: Alvessa is an online platform connecting customers in Utrecht with certified in-home massage therapists. Alvessa is the data controller for the personal data described in this policy.
privacy.s2Body: We process: name and email address (on registration), address details (for in-home appointments), payment information (processed via Stripe — we do not store full payment card details), and booking history.
privacy.s3Title: 3. Why do we process your data?
privacy.s3Body: Your data is processed for the performance of the contract (booking), compliance with legal obligations (including 7-year financial record-keeping), and service improvement. We do not process data for marketing without your consent.
privacy.s4Title: 4. How long do we retain your data?
privacy.s4Body: Account data is retained while your account is active. Booking and payment data is retained for at least 7 years as required by Dutch tax law. You can delete your account at any time via hello@alvessa.nl.
privacy.s5Body: We use Supabase (database hosting) and Stripe (payment processing, PCI-DSS certified) as processors. Where data is processed outside the EEA, we do so with appropriate safeguards. We have data processing agreements with all processors.
privacy.s6Body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. Contact us at privacy@alvessa.nl. You can also lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl).
privacy.s7Body: Questions about this privacy policy? Email privacy@alvessa.nl.

terms.metaDescription: Read Alvessa's terms of service. Applicable to all bookings and use of the platform.
terms.s1Body: Alvessa: the platform connecting supply and demand for in-home massage. Customer: the person booking a session via Alvessa. Provider: the independent massage therapist offering services through Alvessa. Session: the booked in-home massage.
terms.s2Body: These terms apply to all use of the Alvessa platform and all agreements concluded through the platform.
terms.s3Body: A booking is confirmed after successful payment via Stripe. The customer pays the full amount upfront. Alvessa retains a platform fee from the amount paid out to the provider.
terms.s4Body: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before the session. Cancellations within 24 hours may incur a fee of 50% of the session price. Refunds are processed via the original payment method.
terms.s5Body: The provider is responsible for holding valid professional liability insurance, a recognised massage qualification, and Chamber of Commerce registration. The provider acts as an independent contractor and is not an employee of Alvessa.
terms.s6Body: Alvessa is an intermediary platform and is not liable for damages arising from the session itself. The provider bears responsibility through their professional liability insurance. Alvessa's liability for direct damages is limited to the amount of the relevant booking.
terms.s7Body: These terms are governed by Dutch law. Disputes shall be submitted to the competent court in Utrecht.

seoMassageUtrecht.metaTitle: Home Massage Utrecht — Certified Therapists | Alvessa
seoMassageUtrecht.metaDescription: Book a professional home massage in Utrecht. Certified therapists come to you in Centrum, Oost and Leidsche Rijn. Secure payment. Quick booking.
seoMassageUtrecht.intro: Professional relaxation without travel time. Book a certified massage therapist in Utrecht who comes to you — at home or wherever you feel comfortable. Active in Utrecht Centrum, Oost and Leidsche Rijn.
seoMassageUtrecht.benefit1Body: The therapist comes to you. Nothing to prepare, and you can relax immediately after the session.
seoMassageUtrecht.benefit2Body: Every Alvessa therapist holds a recognised massage diploma, professional liability insurance and is registered with the Dutch Chamber of Commerce.
seoMassageUtrecht.benefit3Body: Pay securely online via Stripe. No cash required, everything settled before the appointment.
seoMassageUtrecht.areasBody: Our therapists work throughout Utrecht and surrounding areas:
seoMassageUtrecht.area1Desc: City centre, Wittevrouwen, Lombok and surroundings.
seoMassageUtrecht.area2Desc: Tuinwijk, Watervogelenbuurt, De Uithof and adjacent neighbourhoods.
seoMassageUtrecht.area3Desc: Leidsche Rijn Centrum, Terwijde, Vleuten and De Meern.
seoMassageUtrecht.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about home massage
seoMassageUtrecht.faq1Q: How quickly can I book a massage?
seoMassageUtrecht.faq1A: You can immediately select an available therapist and time slot on our website. Same-day bookings are possible subject to availability.
seoMassageUtrecht.faq2A: The therapist brings a professional massage table, clean sheets and high-quality massage oil. You only need to clear some space.
seoMassageUtrecht.faq3Q: How much does a home massage in Utrecht cost?
seoMassageUtrecht.faq3A: Prices start from €75 for a 60-minute session, depending on the therapist and type of massage.
seoMassageUtrecht.faq4A: Cancellation is free up to 24 hours before the appointment. Please contact us at hello@alvessa.nl. Refunds are processed via your original payment method.
seoMassageUtrecht.ctaBody: Browse available therapists in Utrecht and book directly online.

seoSportmassage.metaTitle: Sports Massage at Home Utrecht — Certified | Alvessa
seoSportmassage.metaDescription: Certified sports massage at home in Utrecht. For athletes, active people and muscle recovery. Therapists active throughout Utrecht.
seoSportmassage.h1: Sports Massage at Home in Utrecht
seoSportmassage.intro: Sports massage focused on muscle recovery, circulation and releasing tension. Our certified therapists come to you — at home or at your location in Utrecht.
seoSportmassage.whatBody: Sports massage is a specific massage technique focused on muscles that are heavily used. Ideal for athletes, active people or anyone with muscle tension from work or sport.
seoSportmassage.forWhomTitle: Who is sports massage suitable for?
seoSportmassage.forWhom2: People with recurring muscle pain or injuries
seoSportmassage.forWhom3: Office workers with neck and shoulder tension
seoSportmassage.forWhom4: Anyone wanting to speed up recovery after intense activity
seoSportmassage.benefit2: Speeds up recovery after intensive training
seoSportmassage.benefit3: Can help reduce muscle soreness and support injury prevention
seoSportmassage.benefit4: Relieves muscle tension from prolonged sitting
seoSportmassage.areasBody: Our sports massage therapists work throughout Utrecht: Centrum, Oost, Leidsche Rijn and surroundings.
seoSportmassage.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about sports massage
seoSportmassage.faq1Q: How long does a sports massage session take?
seoSportmassage.faq1A: Sessions typically last 60 or 90 minutes depending on your needs and the therapist's availability.
seoSportmassage.faq2Q: Do I need to bring anything?
seoSportmassage.faq2A: No. The therapist brings everything including table and oil. Just clear some space at home.
seoSportmassage.faq3Q: How soon after exercise can I book a massage?
seoSportmassage.faq3A: Ideally 24–48 hours after an intensive workout for optimal recovery, though this varies per person.
seoSportmassage.ctaTitle: Schedule your sports massage in Utrecht

seoDeepTissue.metaTitle: Deep Tissue Massage at Home Utrecht | Alvessa
seoDeepTissue.metaDescription: Certified deep tissue massage at home in Utrecht. Targeted at deep muscle tension and persistent adhesions. Book directly online.
seoDeepTissue.h1: Deep Tissue Massage at Home in Utrecht
seoDeepTissue.intro: Deep tissue massage targets the deeper muscle layers and connective tissue. Suited for persistent muscle tension and deep adhesions. Our therapists come to you in Utrecht.
seoDeepTissue.whatBody: In deep tissue massage, the therapist works with slow, deep movements on the muscle layers beneath the surface. It is more intensive than a classic relaxation massage and aimed at releasing chronic tension and adhesions.
seoDeepTissue.benefitsTitle: When is deep tissue massage suitable?
seoDeepTissue.benefit1: Persistent back or neck muscle tension
seoDeepTissue.benefit2: Persistent muscle tension from prolonged sitting or heavy work
seoDeepTissue.benefit3: Muscle recovery after intensive activity (consult a doctor first for medical conditions)
seoDeepTissue.benefit4: Muscle pain that does not respond to standard massage techniques
seoDeepTissue.noteBody: Deep tissue massage can feel more intense than a relaxation massage. Always communicate with the therapist about pressure and your comfort level.
seoDeepTissue.areasBody: Deep tissue massage at home in Utrecht Centrum, Oost, Leidsche Rijn and surrounding area.
seoDeepTissue.faq1A: Deep tissue massage can be more intense than relaxation massage, but should never be unpleasantly painful. You can always ask the therapist to adjust the pressure.
seoDeepTissue.faq2Q: How long does the massage last?
seoDeepTissue.faq2A: For a full deep tissue treatment we recommend 90 minutes, though 60 minutes is also possible for a partial treatment.
seoDeepTissue.faq3A: For chronic complaints a series of 3–5 sessions is common, with 1–2 weeks between each treatment.
seoDeepTissue.ctaTitle: Book your deep tissue massage in Utrecht

seoHotelMassage.metaTitle: Hotel Massage Utrecht — Massage in Your Hotel Room | Alvessa
seoHotelMassage.metaDescription: Professional massage in your hotel room in Utrecht. Certified therapists come directly to your hotel. Quick booking, secure payment.
seoHotelMassage.intro: Staying at a hotel in Utrecht and want to end your evening or afternoon with a professional massage? Through Alvessa you send a certified therapist directly to your hotel room.
seoHotelMassage.how1: Book online via Alvessa — choose a date, time and enter your hotel address.
seoHotelMassage.how2: The therapist comes to your hotel room with table, sheets and oil.
seoHotelMassage.how3: Enjoy a professional massage in your private environment.
seoHotelMassage.hotelsBody: Our therapists are active at many hotels in Utrecht Centrum and surroundings. Enter your hotel address and room number in the notes when booking.
seoHotelMassage.benefit1: No travel — the therapist comes to you
seoHotelMassage.benefit2: Perfect for business trips or weekend getaways
seoHotelMassage.benefit3: Complete privacy in your own hotel room
seoHotelMassage.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about hotel massage
seoHotelMassage.faq1Q: Can I book a massage at any hotel in Utrecht?
seoHotelMassage.faq1A: Yes, our therapists work at many hotels in Utrecht. Enter the address and your room number in the notes when booking.
seoHotelMassage.faq2A: The therapist needs space for a folding massage table (approx. 180 x 80 cm) plus walking space. Most hotel rooms provide sufficient space.
seoHotelMassage.faq3Q: Can I book for two people?
seoHotelMassage.faq3A: You can make two separate bookings for the same time and address. Note this in the notes so the therapists can coordinate.
seoHotelMassage.ctaTitle: Book your hotel massage in Utrecht
seoHotelMassage.ctaBody: Easy online booking, secure payment via Stripe.
